rationale.fidelity: Preserves the exact feasible set, objective, decisions, constraints, and relaxation-strength mechanism.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes the computational pathway and possible planning uses concrete, though the actor, trigger, and formulation-overhead trade-off are only implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; the response makes no unsupported novelty claim and appropriately bounds the contribution.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Clearly labels faster solving and operational value as unestablished and specifies the comparisons and pathway evidence required.
rationale.overall: A faithful and well-bounded computational-value framing with only minor managerial-detail omissions.
